channel.title: journal on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in journal on Nature Works

item.title: Now is the best time for hardwood cuttings
item.description:
A gentle reminder to myself & others to propagate large quantities of hardwood cuttings – they’re so simple & quick, and the rewards are bountiful.

The best time for hardwood cuttings is from mid-autumn until late winter. http://localhost:1313/blog/when-is-the-best-time-for-hardwood-cuttings/
